author: doll-agent
content:
Done — implemented Smaller/Larger associated types in Dimension trait + updated index_axis/insert_axis/remove_axis on both Array<T,D> and ArrayView<'a,T,D> to return rank-preserving views.

Mappings: Ix1..Ix5 chain naturally (Smaller = previous, Larger = next); Ix6::Larger = IxDyn (saturate; no Ix7); Ix0::Smaller = Ix0 (saturate); IxDyn closed under both ops.

5 tests pinning static return types via explicit type annotations: 2D->1D, 3D->2D, insert_axis 2D->3D, remove_axis 3D->2D, and Ix3->Ix2->Ix1->Ix0 chain.

ferray-core: 629 -> 634 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Full workspace builds clean - no call sites broke because no caller explicitly typed the return as IxDyn. Commit bf522c48.
